ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tcrs" (
  "tcr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TCR */,
  "tcr_name" TEXT /* Name of the TCR */,
  "tcr_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the TCR */,
  "tcr_type" TEXT /* Type of TCR (e.g., alpha, beta) */,
  "tcr_species" TEXT /* Species from which the TCR is derived */,
  "tcr_source" TEXT /* Source of the TCR (e.g., lab, clinical trial) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the TCR was created or discovered */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the TCR record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tcr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "peptide_name" TEXT /* Name of the peptide */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide */,
  "peptide_type" TEXT /* Type of peptide (e.g., endogenous, exogenous) */,
  "peptide_source" TEXT /* Source of the peptide (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the peptide was created or discovered */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the peptide record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mhcs" (
  "mhc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MHC */,
  "mhc_name" TEXT /* Name of the MHC */,
  "mhc_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the MHC */,
  "mhc_type" TEXT /* Type of MHC (e.g., class I, class II) */,
  "mhc_species" TEXT /* Species from which the MHC is derived */,
  "mhc_source" TEXT /* Source of the MHC (e.g., lab, clinical trial) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the MHC was created or discovered */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the MHC record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mhc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tcr_peptide_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "tcr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR involved in the interaction */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide involved in the interaction */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the TCR and peptide */,
  "loop" TEXT /* Loop information for the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, non-binding) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was observed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the interaction was observed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the interaction belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_peptide_interactions_tcr_id FOREIGN KEY ("tcr_id") REFERENCES tcrs ("tcr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_peptide_interactions_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_mhc_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide involved in the interaction */,
  "mhc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MHC involved in the interaction */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the peptide and MHC */,
  "loop" TEXT /* Loop information for the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, non-binding) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was observed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the interaction was observed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the interaction belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_mhc_interactions_mhc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mhc_id") REFERENCES mhcs ("mhc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_mhc_interactions_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tcr_mhc_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "tcr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR involved in the interaction */,
  "mhc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MHC involved in the interaction */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the TCR and MHC */,
  "loop" TEXT /* Loop information for the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, non-binding) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was observed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the interaction was observed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the interaction belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_mhc_interactions_mhc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mhc_id") REFERENCES mhcs ("mhc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_mhc_interactions_tcr_id FOREIGN KEY ("tcr_id") REFERENCES tcrs ("tcr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tcr_peptide_mhc_complexes" (
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complex */,
  "tcr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR in the complex */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide in the complex */,
  "mhc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MHC in the complex */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the TCR, peptide, and MHC */,
  "loop" TEXT /* Loop information for the complex */,
  "complex_type" TEXT /* Type of complex (e.g., stable, transient) */,
  "complex_date" TEXT /* Date when the complex was observed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the complex */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the complex was observed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the complex belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_peptide_mhc_complexes_mhc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mhc_id") REFERENCES mhcs ("mhc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_peptide_mhc_complexes_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_peptide_mhc_complexes_tcr_id FOREIGN KEY ("tcr_id") REFERENCES tcrs ("tcr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, FASTA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the security answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tcr_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "tcr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR classified */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for classification (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_classifications_tcr_id FOREIGN KEY ("tcr_id") REFERENCES tcrs ("tcr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide classified */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for classification (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_classifications_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mhc_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "mhc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MHC classified */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for classification (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mhc_classifications_mhc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mhc_id") REFERENCES mhcs ("mhc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the reference belongs to */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference */,
  "reference_description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL to the reference (if available) */,
  "reference_date" TEXT /* Date when the reference was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
